---
title: "Reproducing Results for PLOS ONE"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Reproducing Results for PLOS ONE}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Introduction

This document provides the full reproducible pipeline for the meta-analyses presented in "Advanced Bayesian and Adaptive Evidence Synthesis".

# Setup

```r
library(clauderepo)
```

# Primary Analysis: Blood Pressure Meta-Analysis

Using the internal benchmark dataset:

```r
# Data simulation or load
data <- data.frame(
  study_id = paste0("S", 1:5),
  yi = c(-5.2, -4.8, -6.1, -3.9, -5.5),
  se = c(1.2, 1.1, 1.5, 0.9, 1.3)
)

results <- cbamm(data, design = "pairwise", use_hksj = TRUE)
summary(results$meta)
```

# Bayesian Intelligence

```r
bayes_res <- run_bayesian(data, method = "manual")
# Summary of posterior
mean(bayes_res$samples[,1])
```

# Numerical Integrity

```r
# run_validation_suite()
```
